title: A triangular UFO spotted zigzagging at high altitude under the moonlight [2000]
excerpt: JULY 30th, 2000. Time: 9:55 pm. Duration: 30 seconds. text_preview:
JULY 30th, 2000. Time: 9:55 pm. Duration: 30 seconds. Under great conditions of visibility in the Santa Cândida district, Curitiba, State of Paraná, two people observed a triangular white UFO heading South. The unidentified flying object was spotted zigzagging at high altitude when the witnesses were observing the Moon. The UFO didn’t make any noise and left no condensation trails. There were no video records or photographs.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.5
summary: Two witnesses in Santa Cândida, Curitiba saw a white triangular UFO zigzagging at high altitude heading south for 30 seconds while observing the Moon.
